headline: Corgi Loaf Baking Co.: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Corgi Loaf Baking Co. carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 80.86, led by Justin Jefferson, Kyle Pitts, and Malik Nabers. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Jakobi Meyers at 65.6 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On July 8, Corgi Loaf Baking Co. traded with Rapid Valley Annihilation and acquired 2026 Round 1 (original roster 2) while sending 2027 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 11). The transaction moved out 2 draft assets, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

On June 18, Corgi Loaf Baking Co. traded with Rapid Valley Annihilation and acquired Kyle Pitts while sending Quentin Johnston, 2027 Round 2 (original roster 11). Kyle Pitts is now the verified TE starter at 94.2 C-AVI and 88.0 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks.

On May 27, Corgi Loaf Baking Co. traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired D'Andre Swift, Justin Jefferson, Christian Watson while sending Rashee Rice, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams. D'Andre Swift is now the verified RB starter at 76.6 C-AVI and 79.2 D-AVI; Justin Jefferson is now the verified WR starter at 97.3 C-AVI and 90.8 D-AVI; Christian Watson is now the verified FLEX starter at 70.3 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Justin Jefferson (97.3), Kyle Pitts (94.2), and Malik Nabers (84.5).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jakobi Meyers is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 65.6. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 14 offensive players, with 6 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 74.85.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 14 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
